---
title: "Overview"
author: 
  - name: Adrian R. Pearce
    email: adrianrp@unimelb.edu.au
    orcid: 0000-0003-0089-8474
    url: https://findanexpert.unimelb.edu.au/profile/14397-adrian-pearce
    affiliations:
      - ref: unimelb

affiliations:
  - id: unimelb
    name: The University of Melbourne
    department: School of Computing and Information Systems
    address: Parkville
    city: Melbourne
    region: VIC
    country: AU
    postal-code: 3010
---

<br/>
These are the notes and slides for Synthetic Relativity.
